sections.paragraph:
Original: פּעם

Transliteration: pâ‛am

Phonetic: paw-am'

BDB Definition:

  1. to thrust, impel, push, beat persistently
    1. (Qal) to impel
    2. (Niphal) to be beaten, be disturbed
    3. (Hithpael) to be disturbed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1793

Part(s) of speech: Verb
